title: Dash Enchantment
description: A dash enchantment enchantable on the sword and fully integrated into Minecraft.
body:
### A fully integrated dash enchantment.

## Usage:
  Press crouch + right click on a sword enchanted with dash and fly through the air.

## Integrations:
  Appears in:
-     Creative menu
-     Enchanting table
-     Loot chests
-     Librarian villagers
  Works with:
-     Anvils
-     Grind stones

## Config:

```
dash:
  enabled: true
  max-level: 2
  cooldown-level-1: 40       # seconds
  cooldown-level-2: 30       # seconds
  dash-distance-level-1: 3  # blocks
  dash-distance-level-2: 6 # blocks
```
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KpNHYAv3r0A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
